name: Outer Entity Sothoth
desc:
3+ level 5 monster
Once per turn, you can also Xyz Summon "Outer Entity Sothoth" by using 1 "Entity" monster you control as material (Transfer its materials to this card). (Quick effect): You can attach 1 Fusion, Synchro, or Xyz monster from your field, Extra Deck or GY to this card. (Quick effect): You can detach up to 3 different monster types of materials from this card (Fusion, Synchro, Xyz); apply the following effect(s) depending on what was detached.
●Fusion: Look at your opponent's hand and banish 1 card from it, face-down, until the end of this turn.
●Synchro: Look at your opponent's Extra Deck and banish 1 monster from it, face-down, until the end of this turn.
●Xyz: Banish 1 card on the field, face-down, until the end of this turn.
Cards and effects cannot be activated in response to this effect activation. You can only activate each of "Outer Entity Sothoth" once per turn.
strings: Xyz Summon by overlaying an "Entity" monster
Attach 1 Fusion, Synchro, or Xyz Monster as material
Detach materials to banish opponent's cards face-down
